twitter_posts.title: R to @AnthropicAI: This technique isn't perfect—it can be oversensitive, sometimes flagging analogous features as distinct. But by focusing only on differences, it allows us to audit AI models more ef
twitter_posts.description: This technique isn't perfect—it can be oversensitive, sometimes flagging analogous features as distinct. But by focusing only on differences, it allows us to audit AI models more efficiently.
twitter_posts.author: Anthropic

twitter_posts.title: R to @AnthropicAI: For example, when we compared Alibaba's Qwen to Meta's Llama, we found a "CCP alignment" feature unique to Qwen and an "American exceptionalism" feature unique to Llama.
